title: Culpitt 12" Round Silver Cake Drum Board & White Box Combo, 12 Inch Square Box and Matching Cake Circle Set For Transport
features: CAKE BOARD & BOX - This white box and silver round cake board set is the perfect way to efficiently and safely transport your special homemade cakes for birthdays, celebrations and parties. Pack contains 1 cake board and 1 cake box shrink wrapped together for hygiene.
WHITE CAKE BOX – The cake box with lid is perfect for keeping your freshly baked cakes free from damage. The box is plain white, windowless and 6 inches high.

CAKE DRUM – The round 12 inch cake board, also known as a cake drum, is perfect for a 9" fruit cake or a 10" sponge cake. Covered on the top and sides in an attractive food safe silver coloured foil embossed with a beautiful fern design.

STURDY – A cake drum is the strongest type of cake board and is a great choice for all types of cakes from light fluffy sponges to denser fruit cakes and is the best cake board to support heavier cakes and multi-tier celebration cakes.
EASY TO ASSEMBLE - The plain white cake box is delivered flat and shrink wrapped for hygiene and easy storage but is very easy to assemble meaning you will be ready to transport your cake in seconds.
description: From the manufacturer Culpitt Ltd Established in 1921, Culpitt has been providing cake decorations for nearly 100 years. Culpitt are based in Northumberland and are the UK’s leading manufacturer of Cake Boards, Cake Boxes, Sugar Decorations, Fondant, and Edibles. Culpitt Round Cake Board and Box Combo This white Cake Box and Round Silver Foil Cake Board set is the perfect way to efficiently and safely transport your special homemade cakes for birthdays, celebrations and parties. Pack contains 1 Round Culpitt Cake Drum and 1 Culpitt Cake Box. The finished Cake Board is 0.5" (13mm) thick. Assembled Cake Box is 6" tall. Ideal for large cakes like Birthday cakes, parties, bake sales, and celebrations! Fern textured silver foil with white paper on the base with a bonded fibre board inner. The plain white cake box is delivered flat but is very easy to assemble meaning you will be ready to transport your cake in seconds. White Cake Box White Square Cake Boxes are perfect for keeping your freshly baked cakes free from damage. The box is plain white and windowless. Easy to Assemble The plain white cake box is delivered flat but is very easy to assemble meaning you will be ready to transport your cake in seconds. Cake Drum Cake Boards, also known as a Cake Drum, are perfect for all types of cakes and desserts including fruit cakes, Christmas cakes, birthday cakes, and roulades. Strong A great choice for all types of cakes from sponges to dense fruit cakes this Cake Drum is the strongest type of Cake Board and is the best cake card to support heavier cakes and multi-tier bakes. Culpitt Premium 6 Hole Cupcake Boxes, 5 Pack Culpitt Square Silver Cake Drum Board & White Cake Box Set Culpitt Cake Boards, Silver Fern Culpitt Square Silver Cake Drum Board - Pack of 5 Culpitt Board and Box Combo, Rectangular Colour Splash Food Colouring Gel | Navy Blue Add To Basket Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Add To Basket Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.6 out of 5 stars 878 4.6 out of 5 stars 1,785 4.6 out of 5 stars 1,819 4.8 out of 5 stars 1,215 4.7 out of 5 stars 2,867 4.6 out of 5 stars 3,582 Price £5.49 £ 5 . 49 — no data — no data — no data £9.17 £ 9 . 17 — no data Description perfect for displaying and transporting your baked creations, sturdy white card box with clear window. This white box and silver square cake board set is the perfect way to efficiently and safely transport your special homemade cakes for birthdays, celebrations and parties. A Silver cake board is great for birthdays, anniversaries, christmas, parties, weddings and all celebrations; A multipack of 5 cake boards is an ideal choice for regular cake makers, bakers, and decorators. Pack of 5 individually wrapped drum boards are ideal for presenting your cakes upon. Measuring 13mm in thickness, they are strong enough to support any type of cake, from a heavy fruit cake to a lighter sponge cake. This oblong white box and silver cake board set is the perfect way to efficiently and safely transport your special homemade cakes for birthdays, celebrations and parties. Turn plain cakes into bright, eye-catching creations with Colour Splash Food Colouring Gels. Wide range of superb food colours including blue and pink food colouring. Just a small amount produces instant colour. Pack Size 5 Pack 1 Board and Box 5 Cake Boards 5 Cake Boards 1 Board and Box Available in 25g Tubes and larger packs

specifications_table.Product care instructions: ‎Hand wash not recommended. Use for transporting cakes only.
